feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Celadon City, turning the Lavender Silph Scope thread into a public city investigation.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red stayed close in Celadon and warned that Rocket is most dangerous when nobody is running.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill traced the Silph Scope signal to the Game Corner exterior instead of a hidden dungeon entrance.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket's Game Corner front is operating in plain sight while smugglers keep the underpass route active.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight dream ads have appeared around Celadon, linking city nightlife to Lavender's haunting pressure.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Erika's gym is visible, but the immediate pressure points toward the Game Corner investigation.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Game Corner investigation is unlocked as the next Celadon story beat.
